title: Punch.
content:
There is a queer dolly named Punch,
    Who has a remarkable hunch.
                The tip of his nose
                Is red as a rose,
    And that's how you know Mister Punch.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Richard Hunter, titled "Punch.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
